pain_points: Security data is siloed across multiple systems
Slow response to incidents due to lack of centralized intelligence
Lack of visibility into emerging threats
buying_triggers: Increase in theft or security breaches
Hiring for security or threat intelligence roles
Recent public security incidents or risks

accounts.name: Walmart Inc.
accounts.why_fit: 5,000+ stores, ORC rings coordinating across regions, security data siloed

accounts.name: Target Corporation
accounts.why_fit: 1,900+ locations, theft losses spike 15% YoY, need centralized intel

accounts.name: Home Depot
accounts.why_fit: 2,300 stores, organized theft rings active, regional teams disconnected

accounts.name: Ford Motor Company
accounts.why_fit: 30+ global plants, workplace safety incidents rising, manual monitoring

accounts.name: Johnson & Johnson
accounts.why_fit: 250+ facilities worldwide, expanding security team, need threat correlation

accounts.name: Amazon
accounts.why_fit: 800+ fulfillment centers, theft losses significant, need real-time visibility

accounts.name: Costco Wholesale
accounts.why_fit: 850+ warehouses, rising ORC activity, manual incident response delays

accounts.name: General Motors
accounts.why_fit: 20+ US plants, workplace violence concerns, security systems fragmented

accounts.name: Apple
accounts.why_fit: 500+ retail stores, employee threat intelligence gaps, multi-location blind spots

accounts.name: Best Buy
accounts.why_fit: 1,000+ stores, organized retail crime hitting margins, need signal correlation

triggers.trigger_event: ORC rings coordinating across Midwest districts, $60M losses Q4
triggers.why_now: Regional loss prevention leads can't correlate incidents cross-store
triggers.why_it_matters: 5,000 stores need centralized threat visibility tomorrow

triggers.trigger_event: Theft losses spike 15% YoY, CFO demanding forensics
triggers.why_now: Board review Q1, loss prevention budget under fire
triggers.why_it_matters: 1,900 locations bleeding margin without incident correlation

triggers.trigger_event: Organized theft ring hits 12 Georgia locations in 30 days
triggers.why_now: Regional teams responding blind, no cross-store alert system
triggers.why_it_matters: 2,300 stores disconnected, regional intel never reaches HQ

triggers.trigger_event: Fulfillment center shrinkage breaches $40M annually, internal audit triggered
triggers.why_now: New loss prevention VP demanding real-time visibility across network
triggers.why_it_matters: 800 centers operating without unified threat feed

triggers.trigger_event: Workplace threat lockdown at Dearborn plant, 60+ facilities in dark
triggers.why_now: Chief Security Officer ordered all-plant incident consolidation by March
triggers.why_it_matters: 30 global plants need connected safety intelligence now

triggers.trigger_event: Vendor fraud detected across 3 operating companies simultaneously
triggers.why_now: Compliance demanding unified threat correlation across all 250 facilities
triggers.why_it_matters: Security teams can't connect incidents across divisions today

triggers.trigger_event: ORC activity spiking, manual incident response delays 48+ hours
triggers.why_now: Loss prevention leadership demanding faster threat signal detection
triggers.why_it_matters: 850 warehouses need real-time incident visibility immediately

triggers.trigger_event: Workplace violence threat at Detroit plant, 20+ sites unalerted
triggers.why_now: New Chief Security Officer consolidating fragmented systems by Q2
triggers.why_it_matters: Manufacturing plants operating without unified threat intelligence

triggers.trigger_event: Organized retail crime hitting stores, margin pressure escalating quarterly
triggers.why_now: VP Loss Prevention hired, demanding incident signal correlation
triggers.why_it_matters: 1,000 stores blind to coordinated threat patterns

triggers.trigger_event: Employee threat intelligence gaps exposed at flagship retail stores
triggers.why_now: Head of Retail Security mandating multi-location visibility framework
triggers.why_it_matters: 500 stores lack unified employee risk assessment

outreach.context: Retailers managing 5,000+ locations correlate ORC incidents across districts in real time.
outreach.problem: Midwest ORC rings coordinated $60M Q4 losses — your districts can't see the pattern without connected data.
outreach.question: How are you linking theft incidents across stores today?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Saw Walmart's Midwest ORC surge hit $60M last quarter. Your district teams likely fighting blind. Worth a conversation on cross-store threat correlation?

outreach.email_subject: Theft spike forensics for board review
outreach.context: National retailers defend margin at board reviews using incident correlation across all locations.
outreach.problem: 15% YoY theft spike — CFO demanding forensics you can't generate without unified incident data.
outreach.question: How are you building the forensics case for Q1?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Your theft losses jumped 15% YoY. Board review coming. Hard to defend margin without cross-location incident correlation. Let's talk.

outreach.context: Large retailers stop organized crime rings using real-time cross-store alert systems.
outreach.problem: ORC hit 12 Georgia locations in 30 days — regional teams responding blind without incident correlation to HQ.
outreach.question: How are Georgia incidents surfacing to your central team?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Home Depot's 12-location Georgia ORC hit in 30 days. Regional teams blind to the pattern without unified alerts. Worth 15 minutes?

outreach.context: Enterprise networks stop $40M+ shrinkage using unified threat feeds across all facilities.
outreach.problem: 800 FCs operating without unified threat feed — $40M shrinkage triggered internal audit, loss prevention VP demanding real-time visibility.
outreach.question: How are shrinkage signals reaching your loss prevention leadership?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Amazon's $40M FC shrinkage hit audit threshold. Your 800 centers need connected threat intelligence fast. New LP VP likely demanding this. Talk?

outreach.context: Global manufacturers protect facilities using unified incident intelligence across all plants.
outreach.problem: Dearborn plant lockdown — 60+ facilities stayed dark. CSO ordered all-plant consolidation by March, facilities still disconnected.
outreach.question: How are plant-level incidents reaching your security leadership?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Ford's Dearborn lockdown left 60+ plants unalerted. Your new CSO mandate requires cross-plant visibility by March. Let's discuss your consolidation timeline.

outreach.context: Diversified manufacturers defend compliance using unified threat correlation across all operating companies.
outreach.problem: Vendor fraud hit 3 operating companies simultaneously — compliance demanding threat correlation across 250 facilities you can't currently connect.
outreach.question: How are security incidents shared across your divisions today?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Vendor fraud across your three operating companies exposed division gaps. Compliance demanding unified threat correlation at 250 sites. Let's align on this.

outreach.context: Warehouse retailers stop ORC activity using real-time threat signal detection across all locations.
outreach.problem: ORC spiking — manual incident response delays 48+ hours. 850 warehouses need real-time visibility, leadership demanding faster threat detection.
outreach.question: How are you detecting ORC signals across locations today?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Costco's ORC activity spiking with 48-hour response delays. Your 850 warehouses need real-time detection. New LP leadership likely demanding speed. Talk?

outreach.context: Global manufacturers protect plants using unified threat intelligence across all manufacturing sites.
outreach.problem: Detroit plant violence threat — 20+ sites unalerted. New CSO consolidating fragmented systems by Q2, plants still operating disconnected.
outreach.question: How are workplace threats reaching all your plants simultaneously?
outreach.linkedin_connect: GM's Detroit workplace violence threat left 20+ plants dark. Your new CSO mandate demands unified threat intelligence by Q2. Worth discussing?

outreach.context: National retailers beat organized crime using incident signal correlation across all stores.
outreach.problem: Organized retail crime spiking — 1,000 stores blind to coordinated threat patterns. New VP Loss Prevention demanding incident correlation immediately.
outreach.question: How are you correlating ORC patterns across stores today?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Best Buy's ORC activity escalating quarterly. New VP Loss Prevention hired to fix it. Your 1,000 stores need coordinated threat visibility. Let's talk.

outreach.context: Enterprise retailers defend employee safety using unified risk assessment across all locations.
outreach.problem: Flagship retail employee threats went undetected — 500 stores lack unified employee risk assessment. Head of Retail Security mandating visibility framework.
outreach.question: How are you tracking employee risk signals across locations?
outreach.linkedin_connect: Apple's flagship retail security gaps exposed employee threat gaps. Your 500 stores need unified risk visibility. New Head of Retail Security likely demanding this now.

first_30_days: Call Walmart Loss Prevention leadership: $60M Q4 ORC losses, cross-store correlation gap
Email Target CFO advisor: board review Q1, forensics demand creates budget urgency
LinkedIn message Home Depot Regional Security: 12-store Georgia ring, no alert system
Phone Amazon new VP Loss Prevention: $40M shrinkage, unified threat feed needed
Call Ford Chief Security Officer: Dearborn lockdown exposed 60-facility blind spots immediately
Email J&J Compliance: vendor fraud across 3 companies, 250 facilities unconnected today

sequencing.why: Active incident triggers, board/executive pressure, multi-location visibility gaps create 30-day buying momentum

channels.reasoning: Incident-driven deals require urgency, security leaders respond to direct conversation over email

metrics: Meetings booked with Director+ security role
Accounts with active incident trigger mentioned in call
Follow-up emails sent same day as call
Pipeline value from first 6 accounts contacted
risks: Security leaders gatekeep access; target HR/facilities for warm introduction first
Retail chains have centralized procurement; single conversation won't move deal
Manufacturing plants slow to adopt new tools; emphasize integration with existing systems
